programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev finds out that Bo wants to be a Police Kid, he tells a white lie to make him one for a day! Officer Bo takes the new job too far, ticketing everyone-for everything. Rev will have to tell the truth to fix this mess and get his friend back! // At Camp Sleepaway, Bo is homesick. His friends try to lift his spirits, but after a stinky trip to the outhouse, he's had enough! That is...until a suggestion from Rev helps Bo to see the beauty all around. Maybe camp isn't so bad after all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. The Cowboy Kids track down the thieving rabbits and discover they have babies! Now the posse will need to help the rabbits find a better way to feed.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Gear Up Garage Band // First Aid Fun
programme.desc: At band practice, Rumble struggles to control his nervous backfiring, even damaging the instruments by accident! Determined not to give up on the festival, the gang improvises and uses makeshift instruments. They even feature Rumble's nervous twitch! // When Rev and Owen begrudgingly agree to join Bo's First Aid Games, they do everything BUT take the lessons seriously. It isn't long before the boys find out that first aid isn't all fun and games, but it IS totally awesome!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev, Rumble and their friends help capture a group of wayward llamas, they each try and claim sole credit for the round up. Rev's parents listen patiently to the elaborate tales, each one starring a different hero, before ruling it a team effort! // When Avery creates a magnetic modification for Rumble, it seems to be the perfect solution. Now Rumble can help them tidy up the Gear Up Garage! But things get complicated when Rumble turns into a super-magnet, attracting all kinds of metal debris!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Fender Bend Friend Day // The Rev & Rumble Fan Club
programme.desc: Rev wants to surprise his friends with a movie celebrating their friendship, so he secretly gathers footage to show they're the best friends ever. When Avery realizes what he's up to, she adds her own clips to the movie - surprising Rev as well! // Owen hosts a virtual review of the gang's adventures with Rev and Rumble, plus all of their awesome gear! He walks his viewers through some of their most memorable moments, from mega stunts to monsters to rescue missions.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: After many years of working hard on Accelerator Acres, Tilly the tractor is ready to retire from ranch life. Rev wants to find her the perfect new job, but his ideas are too intense for old Tilly. He'll have to adjust to her slower pace first. // Rev and the gang compete for the title of Best Prankster-except Lori sits out, claiming pranks aren't her thing. After a full day of pranks and laughs, the kids gather for the big party that Lori planned for them...but all is not as it seems!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day
programme.desc: As Rev and Avery compete to see who can be the best helper, they accidentally work against each other and end up making things more complicated for those they // Rev thinks Avery is moving away! Upset, he leads an all-out effort to convince her to stay, showing her that Fender Bend is the best place to live-despite Avery's protests that she's too busy. Finally, Avery confronts their strange behaviour.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Green Phantom // Over Easy Does It
programme.desc: Rev is sure he has the perfect plan to catch an elusive frog, but Avery isn't so sure. After all of his attempts fall through, he's finally ready to accept help-and Avery's idea just might work! Will they finally catch the Green Phantom? // Rev and Avery compete to transport supplies to town for a big event. Avery is faster, so Rev tries to take a short cut to get ahead-but an obstacle stops him in his tracks. How will he finish his delivery in time, let alone win the competition?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery go on an adventure to discover the Crystal Cavern. As they enter the first cave, a swarm of bats scare Rumble so much, he takes off through a maze of tunnels! They can't worry about the Crystal Cavern-they have to find Rumble first! // When Molly tells a campfire story about the Fender Bend Beast, the kids' imaginations run wild. Covered in goop and debris, Rumble scares them into thinking he's the Beast! Avery hatches a plan to trap the "Beast" and save Rumble, who's gone missing

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Gear Up Grand Prix // Chinese New Year
programme.desc: As the Gear Up Grand Prix begins, each of the friends runs into problems and must drop out of the race. Soon, slow and steady Lori is the only one left standing! Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and the gang are painting a mural for Four-Wheeled Friendship Day! But with Avery in charge, the friends start to lose confidence in their work. She may be a master when it comes to art, but Avery has a lot to learn about being project leader! // When the pals befriend a mouse in the barn, Rumble can't resist breaking the rules by bringing the little guy a snack. Before long there are mice everywhere! Rev and Rumble will need to shoo away their tiny guests, before Mom and Dad find them!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. The Cowboy Kids track down the thieving rabbits and discover they have babies! Now the posse will need to help the rabbits find a better way to feed.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend
programme.desc: When damage from a storm threatens to cancel the Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park Skills Contest, Owen is disappointed he won't get to compete. Rev leads the kids in the Stunt Park clean-up, and soon discovers that this is really an opportunity in disguise! // Rev and the gang make their own castle and play as knights of old. But when their sticks and building supplies begin to disappear, Bo leads them into a medieval battle of wits with the culprit-a cranky beaver!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bad Luck Truck // Rev it to the Max
programme.desc: When Rumble cracks his mirror, he thinks it gave him bad luck, and his confidence takes a hit. Even after Rev fixes the mirror and bolsters his pal, the bad luck continues. But when danger strikes, can Rumble regain his self-esteem and save the day? // When Rev hears about a vehicle long jump contest, he dreams of fame and victory. But even with a grueling training plan from coaches Avery and Alley, the record-breaking jump seems out of reach...until Alley ends up in danger and needs their help!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Sing and Dance
programme.desc: Sing, dance & learn with fun songs about health, nature, and classic rhymes!

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: TurboZaurs
programme.desc: The adventures of dinosaur's squad transforming into big machines who are willing to solve any difficulties that kids may face in their everyday life.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Dibo The Gift Dragon
programme.desc: Let's Party in Cozy Island!

programme.title: Everything's Rosie
programme.desc: Join Rosie and her friends as they go on fun adventures, play games and solve problems. Each episode contains an educational message so that kids are engaged while learning. With a focus on friendship the show also promotes positivity through teamwork.

programme.title: Pins and Nettie
programme.desc: Pins and Nettie are besties and there is nothing they like more than going on adventures together, most of time.

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Mya Go is a preschool animated show about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her. Set in the bustling town of Everyday, Mya Go lives here with the Go family and lives nearby her closest friends.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, so does their awareness of the world around them. In this season, discover and learn about animals, starting with the ones that your children may encounter at home, to farm animals, all the way to the most unique of creatures from all 7 continents!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: Soothing Melodies
programme.desc: Immerse in a world of Soothing Melodies like Finger Family, Little Boy Blue, and more

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: From I hear thunder to Farmer in the Dell presenting lullabies that will help kids sleep well.

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Sweet lullabies for peaceful slumber for kids. Hush Little Baby, Little miss Muffet and many more.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Whispering songs that create a peaceful atmosphere for kids, guiding them to sleep.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Chiki Art Soothing's this episode features satisfying artworks like Glitter Fish and Shooting Star.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Chiki Art Soothing is a collection of soothing artworks like Shooting Star, Owl, and much more.

programme.title: Rise and Shine
programme.desc: Take a musical trip every morning with Down by the Bay, Outside my window I see, Car Song and more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Fill the day with music and fun with Ice-cream Song, Clap Your Hands, Johny Johny Yes Papa and more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Crocodile Tears
programme.desc: Cragger and the Crocodiles are taken prisoners by the Wolves. But Laval is determined to free his old friend. Laval, Eris and the mysterious ShadoWind attempt a rescue ... but something about ShadoWind isn't quite right.

programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all - in the form of the T-Rex.

programme.title: Never Forever

programme.title: Sheep Freak

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?

programme.title: La rosa de Guadalupe

programme.title: La rosa de Guadalupe

programme.title: Tres veces Ana

programme.title: Tres veces Ana

programme.title: Tres veces Ana

programme.desc: Facundo lleva a Remedios con Marcelo para que él la mate porque ella provoca que Santiago siga regresando. Claudia se encuentra en el baño de un restaurante con Viridiana y le dice que se cuide de Mariano.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana

programme.title: Tres veces Ana

programme.title: Amor real

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre

programme.title: Qué bonito amor

programme.title: Qué bonito amor
programme.desc: María sufre al saber que Santos ha sido capturado. Coloso idea un nuevo plan para enamorar a María. Coloso paga las rentas atrasadas de María para evitar que la corran de la vecindad. Rodrigo le lleva serenata a Paloma para poder reconquistarla.

programme.title: Qué bonito amor
programme.desc: Justo prepara todo para reactivar sus negocios en México. Fernando intenta que María le dé una nueva oportunidad a Santos de volver a su lado. Vanesa se molesta al saber que Rodrigo ha regresado con Paloma.

programme.title: Qué bonito amor

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Dime de que presumes y te diré de que careces
programme.desc: Diana es una chica que se lastima a sí misma para llamar la atención y sentir un alivio ante los problemas que existen en su casa. Diana se enamora de Adrián, un nuevo compañero de la escuela pero provoca los celos de Rebeca, su mejor amiga.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Alejandro es un adolescente que decide irse de casa por tener discusiones con su papá, tras la muerte de su madre. Una fuerte experiencia con un criminal, provoca que el joven reaccione y valore la vida de su padre logrando perdonarse.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Lucía es una chica que descubre la infidelidad de su novio. Lucía tiene una infección en los ojos y su madre compra un medicamento económico que le provoca ceguera. La joven culpa a su mamá de su desgracia, pero pronto su vida cambiará.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Humberto es agredido por uno de sus compañeros del salón, harto de la situación decide vengarse de ellos y toma la pistola de su padre para amenazar al niño que lo molesta. Uno de sus amigos le dice que no lo haga y esconde la pistola.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Jorge es un joven rebelde que no respeta a su madre. Un día se mete en problemas por culpa de su novia. Pero la vida le da una gran lección al perder a su abuela, la única persona que siempre lo apoyó incluso para que él naciera.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Los papás de Paulina discuten muy seguido por la avaricia de su mamá. Su madre decide mudarse a la casa de su padre después de años de no saber nada de él. Aida le impone a su hija sacarle provecho a las cosas que su abuelo puede comprarle.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Patricio tiene que abandonar a su familia para ir a trabajar al norte. Martín, su hijo se molesta pues no comprende la situación. El hermano de Patricio busca a su familia para quedarse a vivir con ellos y apoyarlos.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Promise' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics, written by DOYOUNG, capture the feelings he couldn't easily express as his love grew deeper. Even if the confession comes late, it delivers a sincerity and emotional resonance stronger than any other words.The title track “Promise” is an impressive ballad that begins with a minimal piano melody and gradually builds emotional depth as strings are added in the latter half.

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)' Live Clip
programme.desc: With Belle participating as a featuring artist and harmonizing with DOYOUNG, the synergy between the two elevates the charm of the song even further.The track “Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)” is an R&B ballad that depicts a moment of exchanging feelings through the sound of a whistle. Layered over a jazz guitar melody, the sweet vocals blend together like a conversation, conveying a lovely sense of fluttering excitement.

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.EXO has returned with a new trailer.

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.”

programme.title: MINHO 민호 'TEMPO' MV
programme.desc: The title track “TEMPO” is a dance song that creates a cool vibe with its groovy 808 bass and a variety of rhythmic instruments. The lyrics convey the message of approaching the other person at the pace they desire. In addition, the performance is designed with bold, dynamic movements that highlight MINHO's distinctive physique, along with choreography that matches the song's groovy mood. The latter part of the performance, featuring impressive synergy with the dancers, is expected to deliver an energetic atmosphere that everyone can enjoy together.

programme.title: Manu Katché, Alfio Origlio, Walter Ricci & Jérôme Regard
programme.sub-title: Katché & Origlio Quartet feat. Walter Ricci
programme.desc: Four exceptional musicians team up to perform classic pop and soul songs made famous by the likes of Gregory Porter, Stevie Wonder, U2, Seal, and many more. Pianist Alfio Origlio signed up to do the arrangements. Walter Ricci, an accomplished jazz vocalist from Naples, eases us into his musical universe with his stunning sensitivity. He is accompanied by an exceptional rhythm section composed of Manu Katché on drums, Jérôme Regard on bass, and Alfio Origlio on piano. This concert was recorded at Festival Jazz au Sommet 2020 in France.

programme.title: Jaco Pastorius
programme.desc: The audience at the Montreal Jazz Festival in Canada was in for a treat on July 3, 1982, as a true musical innovator hit the stage: Jaco Pastorius, who transformed the electric bass into a formidable solo instrument. Combining intricate harmonics, fluid melodies, and unparalleled technical skill, Pastorius left a lasting impact on the music world. In this concert, he is accompanied by Peter Erskine (drums), Don Alias (percussion), Othello Molineaux (steel drums), Bob Mintzer (tenor sax and bass clarinet), and Randy Brecker (trumpet and electronics). They perform “Chicken”, “Donna Lee”, “Mr. Phone Bone”, and “Fannie Mae”. Don't miss this extraordinary opportunity to experience Jaco Pastorius's electrifying performance at the Montreal Jazz Festival 1982!

programme.title: John Lee Hooker, Carey Bell, Jimmy Dawkins & Joe Harper
programme.sub-title: John Lee Hooker Live in Paris
programme.desc: In this 1970 performance at Maison de la Radio in Paris, France, American blues legend John Lee Hooker (voice and guitar) is joined by the masterful Carey Bell (harmonica), Joe Harper (bass), Lester Dorsie (drums), and Jimmy Dawkins (electric guitar). From the first to the very last minute of the concert, Hooker illustrates why he, 45 years later, was to be ranked 35th on Rolling Stone's 2015 list of 100 Greatest Guitarists: this bluesman is truly in a class of his own.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: John Coltrane, McCoy Tyner, Elvin Jones & Jimmy Garrison
programme.desc: The mere mention of the name John Coltrane evokes a deeply emotional, often spiritual response from even the most casual jazz fan. Dexter Gordon was a fantastic saxophonist. Miles Davis was a genius. Coltrane stood above - he was a visionary, a saint-like figure. By the standards of most jazz musicians, his life was uneventful. Sure, he had a heroin habit for a while, and Miles Davis punched him, but once he'd experienced the “spiritual awakening” described in the liner notes of his 1965 album A Love Supreme, he dedicated himself to his music with extreme single-mindedness. This broadcast of Coltrane's 1965 performance at the short-lived Belgian jazz festival in Comblain-la-Tour features Trane's classic quartet with Elvin Jones (drums), Jimmy Garrison (bass) and McCoy Tyner (piano).

programme.title: Lucky Peterson & The Organization
programme.desc: Every year since 1970, the German city of Burghausen has been hosting one of the largest jazz festivals in the world. During Burghausen International Jazz Week, Burghausen becomes a 'Bavarian jazz mecca': guests from all over the world join the Burghausers to enjoy the most wonderful jazz performances as the colorful hustle and bustle of spectators and musicians shake up the city. In 2019, one of these artists is the legendary bluesman Lucky Peterson, master of the blues guitar and Hammond organ, who celebrates 50 years on stage. Peterson is accompanied by his band The Organization, augmented by the talented vocalist Tamara Tramell. In a singular performance, she offers a fascinating mix of southern soul and modern R&B, exploring the limits of blues and funk.

programme.title: Omer Avital
programme.sub-title: Omer Avital Qantar - Jazz in Duketown
programme.desc: Jazz in Duketown is the largest free outdoor jazz festival in the Netherlands. It's a real gathering for jazz addicts, inviting internationally renowned artists. Israeli-American double bassist Omer Avital plays radiantly energetic, resounding jazz with oriental influences. At Jazz in Duketown 2019, Avital forms a quintet with saxophonists Asaf Yuria and Alexander Levin, drummer Ofri Nehemya, and pianist Eden Ladin. They present singular repertoire from Avital's album 'Qantar'.

programme.title: Mel Lewis, James Powell, William Powell & Glenn Drewes
programme.sub-title: The Mel Lewis Orchestra live at Estival Lugano
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. The Mel Lewis Orchestra was arguably the most influential big band since the swing era. They were an unusual band, creating new styles, succeeding in an era when big bands were unpopular and remaining integrated during racially tense periods.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Herbert Blomstedt & Lucerne Festival Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Piano Concerto No. 1 & Symphony No. 2
programme.desc: At the age of seven, Argentine pianist Martha Argerich made her debut with Ludwig van Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 1 in C major, Op. 15, a piece that would accompany her throughout her career. The celebrated pianist performs this signature piece at the Lucerne Festival with the Lucerne Festival Orchestra under the baton of Swedish conductor Herbert Blomstedt, who makes his festival debut with the orchestra. Beethoven's Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 36, is also on the program. This performance was recorded at the Lucerne Culture and Congress Center (KKL), Switzerland, in August 2020.

programme.title: Luca Vignali, Angelo De Angelis, Carmine Pinto & Eliseo Smordoni
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Quintet for piano and winds, Op. 16
programme.desc: Luca Vignali (oboe), Angelo De Angelis (clarinet), Carmine Pinto (horn), Eliseo Smordoni (bassoon), and Linda Di Carlo (piano) perform Ludwig van Beethoven's Quintet for piano and winds in E-flat major, Op. 16. The piece, completed in 1796, is assumed to have been modelled on Mozart's Quintet for piano and winds, K. 452. Both quintets are scored for the same unusual instrument combination, are in the same key, and feature the same three-movement structure. A marked difference is that Beethoven, as a piano virtuoso, wrote the piano parts to highlight the strengths of his playing. Besides, the composer regularly places this instrument in the center of attention. Beethoven published the work in 1801 in two versions: as a quintet for piano and winds, and as a quartet for piano and strings (also designated Op. 16). This performance was recorded at Perugia's Auditorium Santa Cecilia, Italy, on June 23, 2022.

programme.title: Julie Berthollet, Camille Berthollet, Guillaume Vincent & Ensemble Appassionato
programme.sub-title: Berthollet Sisters at Théâtre des Champs-Élysées
programme.desc: For this exceptional recital, recorded in 2019 at the Théâtre des Champs-Élysées, Camille (cello) and Julie Berthollet (violin) are accompanied by pianist Guillaume Vincent and the Ensemble Appassionato under the direction of Mathieu Herzog. The two musical sisters have chosen a repertoire which crosses genres and eras to explore the expressive palette of the violin and cello, from the baroque of Vivaldi to the jazzy notes of Django Reinhardt and Stéphane Grapelli. Among the works on the program are Brahms Hungarian Dances No. 5 and No. 6, Karl Jenkins' Palladio, 'Theme from Forrest Gump' by Alan Silvestri, Schumann's Piano Quintet, Op. 44, The Red Violin by Corigliano, Hungarian Rhapsody, op. 68 by Popper, Minor Swing by Reinhardt/Grappeli and Csárdás by Monti.

programme.title: Leonard Slatkin, Leonard Slatkin, Orchestre National de Lyon & Baiba Skride
programme.desc: Leonard Slatkin conducts the Orchestre national de Lyon in a concert recorded at the Auditorium de Lyon in France, 2013. The concert is a tribute to the organ of the Maurice-Ravel Auditorium, which was made by Aristide Cavaillé-Coll. The program features three works which premiered on exactly the same organ: Camille Saint-Saëns' Cyprès et Lauriers and Symphony No. 3 and Poulenc's Concerto for Organ, Timpani and Strings. Soloist is Vincent Warnier.

programme.title: Julijana Sarac
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky & Vadim Rudenko
programme.sub-title: Piano Duets - Mozart, Ravel, Rachmaninoff a. o.
programme.desc: In this splendid concert, exceptional Russian pianists Nikolay Lugansky and Vadim Rudenko join forces in a program for two pianos comprising works of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart, Maurice Ravel, Anton Arensky, Sergei Rachmaninoff, and Nikolai Kapustin. Both pianists, laureates of the prestigious International Tchaikovsky Competition in 1994, have received international recognition. They perform regularly in a duo. On the program: Mozart's Sonata for two pianos in D major, K. 448/375 A Ravel's La Valse (arr. for two pianos) Arensky's Suite No. 1 for two pianos, Op. 15 and Rachmaninoff's Suite No. 1 (Fantasy) for two pianos, Op. 5. As an encore, the duo performs ‘Romance' from Rachmaninoff's Suite No. 2 for two pianos, Op. 17, followed by ‘Overture' from Nikolai Kapustin's Sinfonietta, Op. 49. This performance was recorded at the Tchaikovsky Concert Hall in Moscow, Russia, on November 25, 2021.

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix
programme.sub-title: Blue Wild Angel: Live At The Isle Of Wight
programme.desc: Jimi Hendrix's historic performance before 600,000 people at the Isle of Wight Festival in August 1970 marked the final time he'd play in England. The guitarist passed away less than three weeks later. Directed by Academy Award-winning filmmaker Murray Lerner, the film features originals and covers of "God Save the Queen" and "Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band."

Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
